results.content: * To recipients in Sweden, most parcels are delivered the day after pickup. When you use Cash On Delivery as an additional service, select the COD in the system you use to print your shipping labels and EDI so that the shipping label states that the parcel will be delivered with Cash On Delivery. This additional service gives you the possibility to notify your recipients via text and/or e-mail that the parcel is on its way, and the date and place of delivery. The message means that the recipient receives information more quickly that the parcel has been delivered to the service office and thus the recipient can pick up his/her consignment without delay. In cases where the parcel is delivered to the recipient's door, the message indicates when delivery will take place to the recipient's address.

results.title: 10 Swedish brands and innovations - Sweden.se
results.content: # 10 Swedish brands and innovations. Some Swedish brands and innovations are known around the world without most people knowing that they're Swedish. While people probably recognise the name Electrolux on their kitchen appliances, many may not know that this company is Swedish – or that it is one of the best selling household appliance manufacturers in the world. Bringing Sweden’s quintessential minimalist yet chic style of fashion to the world is H&M, more known as H&M. Started in 1947 as a women’s clothing store called Hennes (which means 'hers' in Swedish) in Västerås, founder Erling Persson later bought hunting and fishing equipment store Mauritz Widforss – and that’s how Hennes & Mauritz, later H&M, was born. Among the more famous Swedish brands and innovations, we find Volvo – as iconic as Swedish meatballs. There are many personal stories behind Swedish brands and innovations. Among the Swedish brands and innovations, we find the zip. Among the Swedish brands and innovations, we find the zip.
